data.title: Amazon Gets $315 Target as Advertising Momentum Strengthens for 2026
data.description:
Shares of Amazon. com, Inc. closed lower on January 13, 2026, even as Wall Street turned more bullish on the company’s medium-term outlook. The stock finished the session at $242
source: https://www.ethnews.com/amazon-gets-315-target-as-advertising-momentum-strengthens-for-2026/

data.title: U.S. Third Quarter Current Account Deficit Records Smallest Since Q2 2023
data.description: According to Odaily, the United States recorded a current account deficit of $226.4 billion for the third quarter, marking the smallest deficit since the second quarter of 2023.

data.title: Spot gold briefly fell after the release of US data but then rebounded quickly, while the US dollar index remained relatively stable in the short term.
data.description: Following the release of US data, spot gold briefly dipped before rebounding quickly, with a short-term fluctuation of nearly $10, currently trading at $4633 per ounce. The US Dollar Index (DXY) is showing little short-term volatility, currently at 99.1. (Jinshi)

data.title: Today, US Bitcoin ETFs saw a net inflow of 8,933 BTC, and Ethereum ETFs saw a net inflow of 54,952 ETH.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, today the US Bitcoin ETF saw a net inflow of 8,933 BTC, the Ethereum ETF saw a net inflow of 54,952 ETH, and the Solana ETF saw a net inflow of 42,888 SOK.

data.title: JustLend DAO's TVL Surpasses $7.08 Billion, Offering High Returns
data.description:
According to ChainCatcher, the total value locked (TVL) on the JustLend DAO platform has exceeded $7.08 billion. The platform has distributed over $192 million in incentives to the community, providing secure and efficient DeFi services to more than 480,000 users worldwide.

Currently, users can earn an annualized return of up to 7.09% by staking USDD, achieving both stable returns and contributing to the ecosystem's development.

As a leading decentralized lending protocol within the TRON ecosystem, JustLend DAO aims to continue offering diverse earning opportunities and a seamless financial experience for its users.

data.title: U.S. Trade Deficit Hits Lowest Level Since 2009, GDP Growth Expected to Exceed 5%
data.description: According to Odaily, U.S. President Donald Trump announced that the latest data reveals the country's trade deficit has reached its lowest point since 2009 and continues to decrease. Additionally, the GDP growth rate is projected to exceed 5%, despite a loss of at least 1.5% attributed to the Democratic Party's 'shutdown.' Trump attributes these remarkable figures and the nation's unprecedented success to the tariff policies, which he claims have safeguarded the economy and national security. He expressed hope that the Supreme Court will consider these historically significant achievements before making their most crucial decision to date.

data.title: Rhode Island Proposes Bitcoin Tax Exemption Bill for Small Transactions
data.description: According to Foresight News, Rhode Island has introduced a bill that aims to exempt small Bitcoin transactions from state income and capital gains taxes. The proposed legislation would apply to transactions with an annual volume not exceeding $20,000.

data.title: Breaking News: U.S. November PPI Rises to 3%, Exceeding Market Expectations
data.description: U.S. producer inflation came in hotter than expected in November, adding to concerns that price pressures remain sticky.The Producer Price Index (PPI) rose 3.0% year-over-year in November, surpassing market forecasts and marking an acceleration from the previous month. The reading suggests that upstream inflation pressures persist, even as consumer inflation has shown signs of cooling.A stronger-than-expected PPI may complicate the outlook for Federal Reserve rate cuts, as higher producer costs can eventually flow through to consumer prices. Markets are now reassessing the pace and timing of potential monetary easing, particularly if elevated input costs persist into early 2026.

data.title: Rhode Island, USA, is considering a bill exempting Bitcoin from income tax: transactions under $20,000 may be exempt from income tax.
data.description: Rhode Island has proposed a Bitcoin tax exemption bill that would exempt small Bitcoin transactions with an annual value not exceeding $20,000 from state income tax and capital gains tax. (Bitcoin Archive)

data.title: Citigroup Beats Earnings Estimates but Misses Revenue in Q4 2025
data.description:
Citigroup topped earnings with adjusted EPS of $1. 81, but missed revenue estimates with $19. 9B for the quarter.
source: https://tokenist.com/citigroup-beats-earnings-estimates-but-misses-revenue-in-q4-2025/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=citigroup-beats-earnings-estimates-but-misses-revenue-in-q4-2025

data.title: JPMorgan Shares Slide Despite Earnings Beat as Credit, Fees Pressure Stock
data.description:
Shares of JPMorgan Chase & Co. fell roughly 4. 2% on January 13, 2026, even after the bank reported adjusted fourth-quarter earnings that exceeded analyst expectations. The sell-off reflected investor focus on weaker investment banking revenue, a sizable credit reserve tied to the Apple Card portfolio, and rising regulatory risks surrounding consumer lending
source: https://www.ethnews.com/jpmorgan-shares-slide-despite-earnings-beat-as-credit-fees-pressure-stock/

data.title: Aptos Achieves Record On-Chain Revenue for Two Consecutive Weeks
data.description:
According to Foresight News, data from DeFiLlama indicates that Aptos has set new records for on-chain application revenue for two consecutive weeks. From December 22 to December 28, 2025, Aptos generated approximately $1.65 million in revenue, which increased to $1.75 million from December 29, 2025, to January 4, 2026. On December 31, 2025, Aptos achieved a single-day revenue of $1.07 million, marking a historical high.

The revenue primarily stems from transaction fees, protocol fees, and other application-level monetization, serving as a crucial indicator of genuine on-chain usage and economic density. The continuous rise in application revenue suggests that Aptos network activity is transitioning from short-term incentive-driven growth to being driven by actual utility and sustainable monetization, indicating a steady improvement in the quality of ecosystem development.

data.title: Binance: Fogo Pre-TGE Round 3 has ended, with an oversubscription rate of 40.8 times.
data.description: Binance Wallet announced on its X platform that the third round of the Fogo (FOGO) Pre-TGE Prime Sale has ended. The event was oversubscribed by 40.8 times, raising a total of 316,385 BNB. FOGO tokens will begin circulating on January 15, 2026 at 20:00 (UTC+8). Users who have claimed their Prime Sale Key can then view their balance and trade FOGO tokens in their Binance Alpha account.

data.title: Fed's Kashkari Highlights Importance of Credibility for Next Chair Amid Inflation Concerns
data.description: According to Odaily, Federal Reserve's Neel Kashkari emphasized that the credibility of the next Federal Reserve Chair is of utmost importance. He expressed significant concern over the persistently high inflation rates over the years.

data.title: Federal Reserve Official Kashkari Expresses Doubts About January Rate Cut
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, Federal Reserve official Neel Kashkari has stated that he does not see any motivation for a rate cut in January.

data.title: CZ Binance Square AMA Recap: Bitcoin $200K, Altcoin Season, Meme Coins, and Advice for Beginners
data.description: In a recent AMA livestream on Binance Square, Binance co-founder and former CEO Changpeng Zhao (CZ) shared wide-ranging views on Bitcoin’s long-term outlook, altcoin season, meme coins, trading risks, and the evolving role of social platforms in crypto.Below is a full recap of the key takeaways.1. CZ Warns Against Launching Meme Coins Based on His X or Binance Square PostsCZ cautioned users against using social media posts from him or Yi He as justification to launch meme coins.He said such projects have an extremely low success rate, with unclear origins and high failure risk, and advised users not to assume endorsement based on casual mentions or posts.2. Beginners Should Start Small and Avoid FuturesCZ emphasized that crypto beginners should start with small capital, focusing on learning before scaling up.He strongly advised newcomers not to begin with futures or options, recommending gradual exposure instead of leverage-driven trading.3. Altcoin Season Is “Definitely Coming”According to CZ, altcoin season will arrive eventually, though the exact timing, duration, and which tokens will benefit remain unpredictable.He stressed that altcoin cycles are complex and cannot be precisely forecast.4. BNB Ecosystem Is Stable and Has Long-Term PotentialCZ described the BNB ecosystem as large, stable, and supported by many active builders.He expressed confidence in BNB’s long-term potential, highlighting continued development across the ecosystem.5. Prediction Markets Are Still Early and IlliquidOn prediction markets, CZ noted that the sector remains very early-stage, with few market makers.He said platforms like Polymarket reportedly rely on just one or two market makers, with most activity still centered on sports-related markets.6. Bitcoin Will Reach $200,000 — Timing Is the Only UnknownCZ reiterated a bold long-term view:Bitcoin will “definitely” reach $200,000, with uncertainty only around when, not if.He framed this as a conviction rather than a short-term prediction.7. Genuine Meme Coins Must Have Historical or Cultural MeaningCZ said truly valuable meme coins should have historical significance or strong narrative relevance.He estimated that over 90% of meme coins fail, warning early investors about high risk and stressing personal responsibility for investment decisions.8. Binance Square vs. X: Different FoundationsCZ explained that Binance Square and X operate on fundamentally different models.He expressed skepticism that X could easily enable crypto trading due to KYC challenges, noting that most Binance Square users have already completed identity verification.9. CZ Hopes Meme Coins Continue Growing — From a Builder’s PerspectiveWhile stating he no longer relies on meme coins to “get rich overnight,” CZ said he hopes meme coins continue gaining popularity.From a builder’s standpoint, he said his focus is on creating better, smoother tools for users rather than speculation.
